name: Editorial
description: Magazine-cover feel — refined serif, generous whitespace, restrained palette
use_for: long-form essays, op-eds, thoughtful explainers, founder-letter content

accent.role: drop caps, pull-quotes, single emphasis line

flux.positive_prefix: Editorial magazine cover photograph, shot on medium format, single subject in shallow depth of field, natural window light, warm cream backdrop, restrained composition with generous negative space.
flux.positive_suffix: Print magazine aesthetic, refined, NOT busy, NOT cluttered, single focal subject.

always_add: single focal subject (no crowds, no group shots)
shallow depth of field with subject sharp and background soft
natural lighting (window or overcast), no studio flash
warm neutral backdrop matching paper-cream palette
